lessons.title: Why Names? The DNS Problem
lessons.description: Understand why we need a phonebook for the internet and the hierarchical structure of DNS.

lessons.title: The Resolution Journey
lessons.description: Follow a DNS query from your browser to the root servers and back – iterative vs recursive.

lessons.title: DNS Record Types Deep Dive
lessons.description: Master A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, NS, TXT, and more – the building blocks of DNS data.

lessons.title: DNS Security: Poison, Spoof, Defend
lessons.description: Explore cache poisoning, DDoS amplification, DNSSEC, and modern encrypted DNS.
